title: Nursery Rhyme. XXXVIII. Literal
content:
Apple-pie, pudding, and pancake,
        All begins with an A.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. XXXVIII. Literal", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
